stages.label: 1st Observation — Courtesy Notice
stages.action: Email only. No letter. No fine. 20-day deadline to resolve.

stages.label: 3rd Observation — 1st Fine
stages.action: Mailed letter. $50 fine posted to Buildium ledger.

stages.label: 4th Observation — 2nd Fine
stages.action: Mailed letter. $100 fine posted to Buildium ledger.

stages.label: 5th Observation — 3rd Fine
stages.action: Mailed letter. $150 fine posted to Buildium ledger.

stages.label: 6th Observation — Right to Cure
stages.action: Certified letter. $55 charge. Board must approve before sending.

stages.label: 7th Observation — HOA Cures at Owner Expense
stages.action: Board decides action. $200 minimum charge. HOA arranges cure at owner expense.

trash_blackout_days.note: No trash can violation the day before or after pickup

not_currently_enforced: Fewer than 3 living plants in front yard (minimum vegetation rule)
